problems_encountered.description: Cannot test Redis get operation because no Redis databases exist and create operation failed with 404. Redis functionality appears unavailable for this project/server.

tool_response_summary: Tool not executed due to missing prerequisite Redis database. Create operation failed with 404, preventing test of get functionality.
execution_notes: Tool schema requires redisId parameter. Based on Redis create and versions failures (404 and 403), Redis feature appears unavailable for this environment. Unable to validate get operation without existing database.
